---
name: Expectation(s)
about: Request a new expectation
labels: expectation
---

## Expectation
The name of the expectation and how it is supposed to be used.

## Why
Why this expectation should be added to RXpect instead of an extension crate.

## Usage

```rust
expect(value).to...
```

## Suggested failure message template

A suggestion of the text shown when the expectation fails

```
Expectation failed (...)
...
``
